form.formComment: Finished off last campaign with a eighth (25.22) in a GR 5 at Bendigo 11 weeks ago. Looks a definite winning chance.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Finished off last campaign with a eighth (25.22) in a GR 5 at Bendigo 11 weeks ago. Looks a definite winning chance.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Faltered and lost ground in back straight.

form.formComment: In the money last time at Warragul (23.31) in a Grade 5, finishing a 4.5 lengths third. Fairly consistent record from the draw including a win and two minors. Looks suited here and can measure up on best.

form.formComment: Last start finished 4th over 300m at this track beaten one length (16.91) behind Little Master in a Grade 5 on April 10. Looks a strong winning hope.

formComments.comment: Last start finished 4th over 300m at this track beaten one length (16.91) behind Little Master in a Grade 5 on April 10. Looks a strong winning hope.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Turned head outwards and visibly eased approaching winning post.

form.formComment: Won two starts back when well in the market at this track over 300m. Last start finished 6th on March 25 over 300m at this track behind Athenian Goddess beaten one length (17.08) in a Grade 5. Had won two on end prior to the latest effort. Can atone.

form.formComment: Missed the frame when sixth (23.71) at Warragul at last run and returns here after a nine months break. Looks tested.

form.formComment: Backs up after finishing 6th on April 13 over 390m at Ballarat in a Grade 5. Can't recommend against this lot.
